title: Miconia formicojuruensis
taxonomy: Miconia formicojuruensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It belongs to the genus Miconia, which comprises over 1,000 species of plants. The classification of Miconia formicojuruensis also includes the order Myrtales and the class Magnoliopsida. The plant's specific classification is further detailed at the rank of family, genus, and species. This classification system helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships between different plant species.

intro: Miconia formicojuruensis, a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, is native to the Amazon rainforest. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its potential health benefits.
